name: vibe
description: Vibecade's Vibe monorepo: language, docs, editor support, and self-describing bootstrap artifacts.

scripts.check: pnpm run self:plan && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.vibe:lanes: cd go && go run ./cmd/vibe lanes --plan docs/examples/vibe-self-plan.json
scripts.vibe:graph: cd go && go run ./cmd/vibe graph --plan docs/examples/vibe-self-plan.json --out docs/examples/vibe-lanes.mmd
scripts.vibe:serve: cd go && go run ./cmd/vibe serve --plan docs/examples/vibe-self-plan.json --addr 127.0.0.1:8787
